steps.title: Use the package minimum
steps.content: To maximize the number of $95$-pound packages, use the minimum total number of packages, $12$. Let $y$ be the number of $95$-pound packages, so the number of $80$-pound packages is $12-y$.

steps.title: Apply the weight limit
steps.content:
Substitute into the weight constraint.
$$80(12-y)+95y\leq1{,}050$$
$$960+15y\leq1{,}050$$
$$15y\leq90$$
$$y\leq6$$
The answer is C.
